tool_calls_made.name: handoff_to_structured

arguments.reason: Venue found with confirmed availability for 12 people in Old Town. Calculated cost exceeds initial budget but meets minimum spend requirements.
arguments.context: User requested Haymarket venue but no options available for party size 12. Alternative found in Old Town with 16 seats available at 19:30 on 2026-04-25. Total cost £1234 with £370 deposit required.
